title: MDC_cut: A Python-based GUI software for comprehensive ARPES data analysis

paper_analysis.summary: The paper presents MDC_cut, a GUI-based Python software for analyzing ARPES datasets, with native support for PREVAC EA15 electron analyzer data formats.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: The paper appears to describe software for ARPES data analysis rather than presenting a specific dataset for download.
